title: Office Properties Income Trust plunges amid report of potential bankruptcy
content:
[Concept image of Business Acronym REIT as Real Estate Investment Trust. 3d rendering]
Kwarkot/iStock via Getty Images

Office Properties Income Trust (NASDAQ:OPI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/OPI]) dropped 29% after a report that the REIT is considering a bankruptcy filing.

Office Properties Income Trust (NASDAQ:OPI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/OPI]) is looking at a possible bankruptcy filing ahead of its more than $900 million of debt maturities through 2027, according to a posting on X [https://x.com/rachel_butt/status/1968383969361285626]from a reporter from 9fin.com.

OPI didn't immediately respond to Seeking Alpha's email request for comment.

MORE ON OFFICE PROPERTIES INCOME TRUST

 	* Office Properties Income Trust (OPI) Q2 2025 Earnings Call Transcript [https://seekingalpha.com/article/4807298-office-properties-income-trust-opi-q2-2025-earnings-call-transcript]
 	* Office Properties Income Trust 2025 Q2 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation [https://seekingalpha.com/article/4806904-office-properties-income-trust-2025-q2-results-earnings-call-presentation]
 	* OPI outlines Q3 2025 FFO guidance of $0.07-$0.09 per share as leasing challenges persist [https://seekingalpha.com/news/4476240-opi-outlines-q3-2025-ffo-guidance-of-0_07-0_09-per-share-as-leasing-challenges-persist]
 	* Financial information for Office Properties Income Trust [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/OPI/income-statement]
